levelList.name: 迸射-正午
levelList.desc:
[WideAreaRampage]
本技能每次命中時，対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>触発以下效果
- 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加1級[Combustion]強度或1級[Vibration]強度
- 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>未帯有[VibrationIgnition]，則使其[Switch_Vibration]為[VibrationIgnition](每个<color=#ffffff>目標</color>最多1次)
[WhenUse]
- 使本技能的<color=#ffffff>拼点威力</color>+3
- 若主要<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Combustion]強度与[Vibration]強度之和不低于6級，則使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1，<color=#ffffff>拼点威力</color>+2
- 対<color=#ffffff>全体</color><color=#ffffff>目標</color>施加2層[Combustion]
- 対<color=#ffffff>全体</color><color=#ffffff>目標</color>施加2層[Vibration]
[EndSkill]
- <color=#7C5738>下回合</color>対命中的<color=#ffffff>全体</color><color=#ffffff>目標</color>施加1層[ResultReduction](<color=#7C5738>每回合</color>最多1次)
- 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得1層[Firstlight]
- 対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加1層[CaseOverheating]
